\tzpentry{ID4751}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4751 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\hat{H}_{\\alpha} = \\left[ \\frac{(\\mathbf{P} - q\\mathbf{A})^2}{2m_{\\alpha}} + V_{\\text{Coulomb}} \\right] \\otimes \\exp(i \\theta_{\\text{twist}} \\cdot \\sigma \\cdot \\mathbf{L})\n\\end{equation}
